case_title: NATIONAL GUARDIAN SECURITY SERVICES vs. STANDARD & HALL SHIP SUPPLY CO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST LOST ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL GUARDIAN SECURITY SERVICES
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT STANDARD & HALL SHIP SUPPLY CO
